challenges.title: Fading Gallery
challenges.description: Create a row of images that fade to 50% opacity and scale up slightly on hover, with a smooth transition.

challenges.title: Overlay Effect
challenges.description: Create a card with a background image and a semi-transparent overlay that reveals text on hover.
hints: Position the overlay absolutely over the image

challenges.title: Opacity vs rgba Showdown
challenges.description: Build two identical cards — one using `opacity` on the parent, one using `rgba()` for the background — to demonstrate the difference in child element rendering.
hints: Include text and nested elements in both cards
Use the same alpha value (0.5) for both
